session_summary: DuckDB data pipeline implementation — Postgres-to-DuckDB export mechanism with persistent database file, corrected analytical views, and idempotent pipeline guard. The duckdb_query tool now returns real analytical data when OPENCODE_DUCKDB_PATH is configured. Implementation went through 3 plan revision rounds (critic found 5 blocking defects), execution created 2 new files and modified 3, stress testing found 7 blocking defects that were all repaired. All 21 DuckDB tests pass.
deferred_seams: Integration tests with real duckdb binary (CI-gated)
next_steps: 1. Add integration tests with real duckdb binary (CI-gated, following pgTestLayer pattern). 2. Add periodic/incremental data refresh (P1). 3. Add user-visible pipeline status indicator. 4. Explore WASM DuckDB for in-process analytical queries.
